---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for TokenWatch
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve, or what workflow is currently painful? A clear statement of the "why" is more useful than jumping straight to a solution.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — UI sketches, example interactions, or pseudocode all help.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else that would help us evaluate the request.
